content.thinking:
Let me analyze the source file and convert it to a knowledge file following the work steps.

**Step 1: Title**
"テストケース毎に言語を設定する方法を教えてください"

**Step 1.5: Check for no-knowledge-content**
The source has actual content - it contains an answer with XML configuration examples and instructions. So `no_knowledge_content: false`.

**Step 2: Build section list**
This is an RST file. Looking for h2 headings (text followed by `-----`). The source has only the main title with `=====` underline. There are no `-----` h2 headings. 

The entire file forms a single section, so I'll treat it as `s1`.

**Step 3: Extract section content**

Now I'm identifying the key layers in the content. The source includes a question, an explanation that modifying the Cookie language setting enables per-test language configuration, instructions for setting up the Cookie name in the configuration, an XML example showing how to implement this, a note about handler setup in the repository, and a reference to related documentation. I need to extract the core actionable information while preserving the essential guidance about using Cookies to control language per test case.

The main points to capture are that the Cookie language value can be changed in the test data sheet, the Cookie name comes from the configuration file's `cookieName` property, the handler must be configured in the repository, and the XML configuration demonstrates the necessary properties like `LanguageAttributeInHttpCookie`, `defaultLanguage`, `supportedLanguages`, and `cookieMaxAge`.

Now I'm drafting the section content to explain how to change language per test case by modifying the Cookie value in the test data sheet, with the Cookie name sourced from the configuration file and the handler properly set up in the repository. Configuring the XML component with properties for the cookie name, default language set to Japanese, supported languages as Japanese and English, and a Max-Age value of about 90 days for cookie persistence. Since the base URL is empty, I don't have any official documentation URLs to include, so `official_doc_urls` will be an empty array. Now I need to assemble all these components into the final JSON structure.

input.title: テストケース毎に言語を設定する方法を教えてください

index.title: テストケース毎に言語を設定する方法
hints: リクエスト単体テスト言語設定
テストケース言語切り替え

sections.s1:
リクエスト単体テストでケースごとに言語を変更するには、Cookieに設定される言語を変更する。テストデータシートにCookieに設定する値を準備し、Cookie名称は設定ファイルの `cookieName` プロパティのvalue値を使用すること。

> **注意**: Cookieから言語を設定するためのハンドラーがリポジトリに設定されている必要がある（各プロジェクトのアーキテクトが実施）。

**クラス**: `nablarch.common.web.handler.threadcontext.LanguageAttributeInHttpCookie`

```xml
<component name="threadContextHandler"
    class="nablarch.common.handler.threadcontext.ThreadContextHandler">
  <property name="attributes">
    <list>
      <component name="languageAttribute"
          class="nablarch.common.web.handler.threadcontext.LanguageAttributeInHttpCookie">
        <property name="cookieName" value="lang" />
        <property name="defaultLanguage" value="ja" />
        <property name="supportedLanguages" value="ja,en" />
        <property name="cookieMaxAge" value="7776000" />
      </component>
    </list>
  </property>
</component>
```

| プロパティ名 | 説明 |
|---|---|
| cookieName | 言語を保持しているCookie名称 |
| defaultLanguage | デフォルト言語 |
| supportedLanguages | サポートする言語（カンマ区切り） |
| cookieMaxAge | CookieのMax-Age値（秒） |
